work_context.title: Plan next MCP slow-call optimizations
work_context.planTitle: Reduce the next highest-priority MCP slow-call hotspots after excluding prism_mutate mutate.coordination, starting with prism://plans, prism_concept, and shared compact-tool read paths, then validate the latency improvements with repo-wide call-log evidence.
